evidence_version: IEEE Transactions on Computational Intelligence and AI in Games 3(3) 2011
screening_locator: OpenAlex record abstract sentences 1-5; Crossref record message.link version of record
exclusion_reason: Accessible index abstract states it generates racing-game tracks but publisher and indexed repository full text were unavailable so no material technical evidence was inspectable.
notes: DOI publisher link returned no full text; Crossref version-of-record link returned HTTP 418; CiteSeerX returned HTTP 404; institutional repository returned HTTP 403; OpenAlex exposed no open full text.
Adjacent-domain mapping: BeamNG road center-line control-point splines and JSON point sets map directly to a robot-course centerline and corridor representation.
